'''kawodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabiophobia|scabiophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabiophobia|scabiophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kawodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwedeth|kæwedeth]] || [[word:kæwedej|kæwedej]] || [[word:kæwedesh|kæwedesh]] || [[word:kæwede|kæwede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawowodoth|kawowodoth]] || [[word:kawowodoj|kawowodoj]] || [[word:kawowodosh|kawowodosh]] || [[word:kawowodo|kawowodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawodoth|kawodoth]] || [[word:kawodoj|kawodoj]] || [[word:kawodosh|kawodosh]] || [[word:kawodo|kawodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawofdoth|kawofdoth]] || [[word:kawofdoj|kawofdoj]] || [[word:kawofdosh|kawofdosh]] || [[word:kawofdof|kawofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawodotho|kawodotho]] || [[word:kawodojo|kawodojo]] || [[word:kawodosho|kawodosho]] || [[word:kawodoko|kawodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawodoth|kawodoth]] || [[word:kawodoj|kawodoj]] || [[word:kawodosh|kawodosh]] || [[word:kawodo|kawodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawodothol|kawodothol]] || [[word:kawodojol|kawodojol]] || [[word:kawodoshol|kawodoshol]] || [[word:kawodokol|kawodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawodothotho|kawodothotho]] || [[word:kawodojojo|kawodojojo]] || [[word:kawodoshosho|kawodoshosho]] || [[word:kawodoko|kawodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawodothon|kawodothon]] || [[word:kawodojon|kawodojon]] || [[word:kawodoshon|kawodoshon]] || [[word:kawodokon|kawodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawodothoro|kawodothoro]] || [[word:kawodojoro|kawodojoro]] || [[word:kawodoshoro|kawodoshoro]] || [[word:kawodokoro|kawodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
